free_text: Dipole excitations to bound states in 116Sn and 124Sn.
15 MeV linear accelerator in Gent.
Bremsstrahlung.
The targets consisted of 20 mm diameter disks of
highly enriched (116Sn - 97.4%, 124Sn - 96.3%)
metalic Sn, were sandwiched between H3BO3 disks of
the same diameter. The well-known transitions in 11B
and 16O were serves as a standards for energy and
efficiency calibration.
11B and 16O transitions data used for calibration.
4 high-purity Ge-detectors with an energy
resolution 1.7 to 1.8 keV full width at a half
maximum (FWHM) at 1.33 MeV. Two of the detectors were
installed permanently at the scattering angle THETA =
90 degree aboce and below the target. The ither two
were installed left and right grom the target and
were moved between scattering angles THETA = 90
degree (for the
(G-polarised,G') experiments) and THETA = 127 degree
(for the (G,G') experiments).
Corrected by SD and VV: Author's name
corrected (Govart -> Govaert).
Excitation energy Ex.
Integrated cross section Is.
The excitation energies Ex were corrected for  Doppler
and recoil  effect.  Weighted averages of energies of
all available lines were taken.
Statistical information.
Data from Tab.  II were compiled at the Russia
MSU SINP CDFE by V.Varlamov.
Excitation energy Ex.
Integrated cross section Is.
The excitation energies Ex were corrected for  Doppler
and recoil  effect.  Weighted averages of energies of
all available lines were taken.
Statistical information.
Data from Tab. III were compiled at the Russia
MSU SINP CDFE by V.Varlamov.
An averaged elastic photon  scattering  cross  section
was  obtained by smearing out the measured integrated
cross section Is of all observed levels above  5  MeV
via the Breit-Wigner function.
No information.
